nasb.text: To the sons of Gershon, one of the families of the Levites, from the half-tribe of Manasseh, they gave Golan in Bashan, the city of refuge for the manslayer, with its pasture lands, and Be-eshterah with its pasture lands; two cities.

esv.text: And to the Gershonites, one of the clans of the Levites, were given out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with its pasturelands, the city of refuge for the manslayer, and Beeshterah with its pasturelands—two cities;

cnv.text: 以色列人又從瑪拿西半個支派中，把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在巴珊的哥蘭，和哥蘭的郊野，給了利未人的家族中革順的子孫；又給了他們比．施提拉和比．施提拉的郊野，共兩座城。

ccb.text: 以色列人分给利未支派中革顺子孙的城邑有：玛拿西半个支派中巴珊的哥兰避难城和比·施提拉及其草场，共两座城；
